## [00:00 - 03:02]

Remember, none of these templates are supposed to be direct copy and paste that you just fill in and you're done. So definitely some of the sort of standard elements of the Upsell Pages is you're going to have a company logo at the top to make it look professional. You really want to create some sort of fear that they have to sit and watch this video or go through this page. Ideally you've got the step one, two, three just showing them where they are in the sales flow because right now they've made a purchase but the order is not yet complete. The sort of language or the message that you want to convey is that wait a second even though you just placed your order there's something you have to see before we can actually process it is the idea. So there's different ways to say that obviously but the one, two, three step will sort of highlight that they're only on step two and the final confirmation isn't going to happen until they get to the next stage. So the headline there's different, there's all sorts of ways to introduce the headline but ideally what you're going to do here is highlight how to get faster results, claim a huge discount or get access to an upgraded version of whatever they just bought. So there's different, we talk about different offers in the upsell training but that's where you want to emphasize that and then highlight what they can now achieve if they move forward with this. And so this is a general guideline of, so generally the upsell flow goes something like thanks for making your purchase, you made a great decision, I'm so excited that you're part of the family, you've taken an important step to move forward with whatever pain they were experiencing or problem they were experiencing and I'm convinced that your life will never be the same. You don't have to use these exact words but the idea being you're emphasizing the message that you just made it one of the best decisions of your life.

You can highlight the benefits again of the product they just bought really building up that this is what's about to happen and this is so great that they're in a good position but then you sort of segue into but before you move forward I have something else to share with you and then this is where you can introduce different ways to basically tell them that whatever they just bought is great but if they were to buy what we're about to show you their life will be even better and this is where you have to pitch this upsell. So this is where you really want to hype up how if they don't first hype up all the benefits of it and then hype up if they don't move forward they're missing out so you want to create some huge FOMO for just by highlighting how much, ten times better than what they thought it would be just by buying the front end product.
